name: Phantom Ghoul
description:
Okay, so maybe the new ghoul is just a bit curious…but he just really wants to see what you look like naked! Completely naked :)

🜂 🜃 🜏 🜄 🜁

Okay this is definitely one of the funniest requests I’ve gotten in awhile? I had a bit of a hard time figuring out how to do it but I figured newly summoned Phantom was the best way to do it 🥰 enjoy!
